title: The Ark Maxim Is Revealed
description: Nami is pulled into Enel’s escape plan while the remaining fighters try to understand how to stop the coming disaster.
scene: Across pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this scene centers on Enel, Eneru, Nami, Nola, Wyper. Nami is pulled into Enel’s escape plan while the remaining fighters try to understand how to stop the coming disaster.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Eh-- why didn't he fall down!?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: How terrifying... Almighty God sure is frightening!

summary: Nami is pulled into Enel’s escape plan while the remaining fighters try to understand how to stop the coming disaster.
